evals.name: openapi-generation
expectations: Output must be in valid YAML or JSON structure

evals.name: markdown-doc-output
evals.prompt: Generate human-readable Markdown API documentation for a payments API with: POST /payments (create payment), GET /payments/{id} (get payment status), DELETE /payments/{id} (cancel payment). Include examples.
expectations: Output must use Markdown headers (# or ##)
Should describe response format for each endpoint
